title: Data from: Systematic Review on Machine Learning and Deep Learning Approaches for Ovarian Cancer Classification
author: Yehia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains extracted data from 40 studies included in the systematic review on ovarian cancer classification using ML/DL approaches. Files include: 
 1. complete data extraction spreadsheet with study characteristics, performance metrics, and quality assessment scores. 
 2. Systematic review protocol (Word document with complete methodology)
steps_raw:
This dataset contains extracted data from 40 studies included in the systematic review on ovarian cancer classification using ML/DL approaches. Files include:
